# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` and the key implementation files. This change set only updates `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (no runtime code changes), and no additional correctness or safety regressions were found in the reviewed run lifecycle code paths (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`).

## Amendments

None.
